governance.permitted_use: Research and benchmarking; private use only.
governance.redistribution_rights: Official ECOSTRESS page requests citation and states copyright/all rights reserved; converted matrices are private/internal until redistribution rights are clarified.

diagnostics.interpretation: Rupture aux jonctions de détecteurs, calibration locale ou sonde différente.
diagnostics.label: Splice / raccord détecteurs

diagnostics.interpretation: Décalage systématique entre campagnes, instruments ou référence blanche.
diagnostics.label: Erreur calibration / référence blanche

diagnostics.interpretation: Effet systématique du support, blanc/noir, transflectance ou environnement de mesure.
diagnostics.label: Fond différent

diagnostics.interpretation: Artefacts numériques ou traitement spectral incorrect.
diagnostics.label: Erreur interpolation / rééchantillonnage

diagnostics.interpretation: Combinaison possible changement de sonde + splice, amplifiée par géométrie, fond ou calibration.
diagnostics.label: Signature VERA25-like

diagnostics.interpretation: Modification de l'illumination, collecte, angle ou distance sonde-échantillon.
diagnostics.label: Différence de sonde / géométrie

diagnostics.interpretation: Mélange de campagnes, opérateurs, lots, setups ou sous-populations spectrales.
diagnostics.label: Dataset multi-régimes

diagnostics.interpretation: Variété, espèce, lot ou condition différente mais physiquement plausible.
diagnostics.label: Spectre hors domaine valide

top_classes.name: Spectra obtained from the Noncoventional Exploitation FactorsData System of the National Photographic Interpretation Center.

Gray and white weathered runway concrete. Sample had a flat surface, with a matte texture, and very little aggregate showing. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.concrete.paving.solid.0092uuu.spectrum.txt

Variegated bridge construction concrete, with quartz aggregate showing. Sample was gray, smooth, and clean. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.concrete.paving.solid.0397uuu.spectrum.txt

Variegated construction concrete, with quartz and limestone aggregate showing. Sample was gray, and slightly soiled. Concrete was from runway side strips. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.concrete.paving.solid.0424uuu.spectrum.txt

Variegated asphaltic concrete with mostly limestone and some quartz aggregate showing. Sample was rough and black in color. Concrete from runway side strips. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.concrete.paving.solid.0425uuu.spectrum.txt
Light brown, cement construction concrete cinderblock. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.cement.solid.0432uuu.spectrum.txt

A single, slightly translucent coat of alkyd gloss paint on an aluminum surface. Painted surface was smooth and glossy. Black gloss paint is from the Great Life series, by Martin Senour Paints. The paint is non-photochemically reactive. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.paint.solid.0402uuu.spectrum.txt

Two smooth coats of slightly translucent alkyd gloss paint on an aluminum surface. Black gloss paint is from the Great Life series by Martin Senour Paints. The paint is non-photochemically reactive. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.paint.solid.0403uuu.spectrum.txt

A smooth, slightly translucent coat of alkyd gloss paint on construction lumber (pine). Compare with sample 0402uuu.doc and note cellulose spectral features in SWIR and MWIR. Black gloss paint is from the Great Life series by Martin Senour Paints. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.paint.solid.0405uuu.spectrum.txt

Two smooth, slightly translucent coats of alkyd gloss paint on construction lumber (pine wood). Black paint from the Great Life series by Martin Senour Paints. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.paint.solid.0406uuu.spectrum.txt
Bare pine wood construction lumber. Wood surface was sanded and buffed. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.wood.solid.0410uuu.spectrum.txt

Road Asphalts and Tar. Gray and black construction asphalt. The sample was soiled and weathered, with some limestone and quartz aggregate showing. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.asphalt.paving.solid.0095uuu.spectrum.txt

Road Asphalts and Tar. Gray and black construction asphalt. Sample was soiled and weathered, with some limestone and quartz aggregate showing. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.asphalt.paving.solid.0096uuu.spectrum.txt
Road Asphalts and Tar. Black matte construction tar. Sample was weathered. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.asphalt.tar.solid.0099uuu.spectrum.txt
Road Asphalts and Tar. Black, glossy construction tar. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.asphalt.tar.solid.0100uuu.spectrum.txt
